i18n_Items.PrismaticCrystalFruit_Desc: It's unlike any plant you've ever seen.
i18n_String.PrismaticCrystalFruitEaten: uhhh placeholder text but yeah you're great at farming now yipee
i18n_Items.StormTotem_Desc: Activate to greatly increase the chance for a thunderstorm to occur tomorrow. Consumed on use.
i18n_String.StormTotemUnlock: You learned how to make a Storm Totem!
i18n_String.StormTotemUsed: Dark clouds gather in the distance...
i18n_Items.SunTotem_Desc: Activate to greatly increase the chance of a sunny day tomorrow. Consumed on use.
i18n_String.SunTotemUsed: A ray of sunshine glimmers in the distance...
i18n_Items.SnowTotem_Desc: Activate to greatly increase the chance for it to snow tomorrow. Consumed on use.
i18n_String.SnowTotemUsed: You feel a chill in the air, and fluffy clouds gather in the distance...
i18n_Items.WindTotem_Desc: Activate to greatly increase the chance of a windy day tomorrow. Consumed on use.
i18n_String.WindTotemUsed: The breeze flutters around you, and a few stray leaves tumble from the treetops..
